summary: Completed testing V2-20 through V2-23 retail homepage features. Backend APIs working perfectly locally (100% success rate) including new endpoints for products/by-ids and catalog sort. However, major frontend integration issues found - most V2-20+ components not rendering despite implementation existing in codebase. Public URL completely broken (serving wrong app).

critical_bugs.issue: Public URL https://smart-payment-core.preview.emergentagent.com returns 404 for all API endpoints and serves wrong application (Emergent platform preview instead of Y-Store)
critical_bugs.impact: Complete frontend-backend integration failure on production URL

working_endpoints.notes: V2-20: Returns 3/3 products correctly for Recently Viewed component
V2-20: All sort options working (popular, price_asc, price_desc, new, discount)
V2-20: Returns deal product with discount data (Apple Watch 18999 vs 21999)
Returns 58 categories across 10 root categories for CategoriesGrid

critical_bugs.issue: Wrong application served at public URL - shows Emergent preview platform instead of Y-Store retail homepage

integration_issues.issue: Frontend configured to use public URL that returns 404 for all endpoints, causing complete data loading failure
CORS policy blocks auth requests with credentials and wildcard origin

missing_components.issue: Component not found on homepage despite implementation existing in /app/frontend/src/components/home/HeroCarousel.jsx
Component not rendering on homepage despite implementation existing
Component not found despite /api/v2/products/by-ids endpoint working
No quick view triggers found on product cards
Mobile buy bar component not found

partial_components.notes: Component renders but no timer or deal data due to API failures
Component structure exists but no brand items due to API data issues

working_components.notes: Proper title, header, navigation structure present

passed_tests: V2-20: Products by IDs API endpoint
V2-20: Catalog API with all sort parameters
V2-20: Deal of Day data endpoint
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (localhost), 0% (public URL). Frontend: 30% (basic structure + CSS animations working, most V2-20+ components missing)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: 1) Fix public URL routing - currently serves Emergent preview platform instead of Y-Store retail app. 2) Investigate why V2-20+ components (HeroCarousel, ProductSection, CategoriesGrid, etc.) are not rendering on homepage despite implementation files existing. 3) Fix CORS configuration for authentication endpoints. Backend APIs for V2-20+ features work perfectly locally.
